name: Molly Degen Punks #0
description: Molly Degen Punks is a generative art study on identity, multiplicity, and creative diversity. Born from a pixel-art self-portrait, the collection explores 111 structured variations of a single base character. Each piece reflects the idea that identity is never singular — contrast is intentional, difference is structural, and not everything can coexist. Holders receive early access to future Molly universe drops.
